params.name: Crystal Skull
params.source: Fragment Crafting (1.6%), Lottery Machine (0.03%), Relic Forge (Relic RF 80), Time Chest (1.5%), Wishing (0.14%)
params.description:
On Oct 10, 1924, a crystal skull was found in the Maya ruins of Honduras.

The skull crystal was a sacrifice of the Maya. Made with crystals, it has the actual size of a man's head with facial features similar to that of modern people. There are two neat rows of upper and lower teeth. The eyes are inlaid with round crystals, and the nasal bones are made by piecing three crystals together. Legend has it that there were 13 crystal skulls that could speak and sing. These crystal skulls have informa …
